title: Byrsella colossus
taxonomy: Byrsella colossus is a species of fungus in the family Byrsaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota and the kingdom Fungi. Byrsella colossus is classified as a type of lichenicolous fungus, meaning it grows on lichens. The species is thought to be endemic to certain regions and habitats. Further research is needed to fully understand its classification and distribution.
